name: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Provides free health coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.

name: Pradhan Mantri Swasthya Suraksha Yojana (PMSSY)
description: Establishes AIIMS-like institutions and upgrades government medical colleges to improve healthcare infrastructure.

name: National Health Mission (NHM)
description: Umbrella program covering rural and urban health services, maternal and child health, and disease control.

name: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: Cash incentive scheme to promote institutional deliveries among poor pregnant women.

name: Janani Shishu Suraksha Karyakram (JSSK)
description: Provides free delivery, free drugs, diagnostics, and transport for pregnant women and sick newborns.

name: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
description: Early identification and treatment of children from birth to 18 years for health conditions.

name: National Programme for Health Care of the Elderly (NPHCE)
description: Provides specialized healthcare services to elderly people at primary, secondary, and tertiary levels.

name: National Tobacco Control Programme (NTCP)
description: Aims to reduce tobacco consumption and related health risks through awareness and regulation.

name: National Mental Health Programme (NMHP)
description: Provides community-based mental health services and integrates mental health into general healthcare.

name: National AIDS Control Programme (NACP)
description: Prevention, care, and treatment services for HIV/AIDS patients across India.

name: National Vector Borne Disease Control Programme (NVBDCP)
description: Controls malaria, dengue, chikungunya, kala-azar, and other vector-borne diseases.

name: National Leprosy Eradication Programme (NLEP)
description: Provides free diagnosis and treatment for leprosy patients to eliminate the disease.

name: National Tuberculosis Elimination Programme (NTEP)
description: Aims to eliminate tuberculosis in India by 2025 through free diagnosis and treatment.

name: Pradhan Mantri Surakshit Matritva Abhiyan (PMSMA)
description: Provides free antenatal care to pregnant women on the 9th of every month.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer, Diabetes, Cardiovascular Diseases and Stroke (NPCDCS)
description: Focuses on prevention, early diagnosis, and management of non-communicable diseases.

name: National Programme for Control of Blindness and Visual Impairment (NPCBVI)
description: Provides free eye care services and cataract surgeries to reduce blindness.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Deafness (NPPCD)
description: Provides early diagnosis and treatment of hearing impairment.

name: National Oral Health Programme (NOHP)
description: Promotes oral health awareness and provides preventive dental care services.

name: National Programme for Palliative Care (NPPC)
description: Provides palliative care services for patients with life-threatening diseases.

name: Pradhan Mantri Bharatiya Jan Aushadhi Pariyojana (PMBJP)
description: Provides affordable generic medicines through Jan Aushadhi Kendras across India.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Fluorosis (NPPCF)
description: Addresses health issues caused by excess fluoride in drinking water.

name: National Programme on Climate Change and Human Health (NPCCHH)
description: Studies and mitigates health impacts of climate change.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Snakebite
description: Provides awareness, prevention, and treatment for snakebite cases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Occupational Diseases
description: Focuses on occupational health hazards and preventive care.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Zoonotic Diseases
description: Controls diseases transmitted from animals to humans.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Hemoglobinopathies
description: Provides screening and treatment for sickle cell anemia and thalassemia.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Viral Hepatitis
description: Prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of hepatitis infections.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Rabies
description: Provides vaccination and awareness to eliminate rabies.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Japanese Encephalitis
description: Focuses on vaccination and treatment of Japanese Encephalitis.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Kala-Azar
description: Targets elimination of visceral leishmaniasis (Kala-Azar).

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Dengue
description: Awareness, vector control, and treatment for dengue fever.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Chikungunya
description: Vector control and treatment support for chikungunya cases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Malaria
description: Provides mosquito control, diagnosis, and treatment for malaria.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Polio
description: Immunization program to eradicate polio in India.

name: National Immunization Programme
description: Provides free vaccines for children and pregnant women.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Measles-Rubella
description: Mass immunization campaign against measles and rubella.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of COVID-19
description: Provides vaccination, awareness, and treatment for COVID-19.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Non-Communicable Diseases
description: Addresses lifestyle diseases like diabetes, hypertension, and cancer.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Mortality
description: Focuses on reducing maternal deaths through better healthcare.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Infant Mortality
description: Provides neonatal care and awareness to reduce infant deaths.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Occupational Lung Diseases
description: Provides screening and treatment for workers exposed to dust and chemicals causing lung diseases.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cardiovascular Diseases
description: Focuses on prevention and treatment of heart diseases through awareness and medical support.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Diabetes
description: Provides screening, awareness, and treatment for diabetes patients.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Cancer
description: Supports cancer screening, treatment, and palliative care services.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Stroke
description: Provides awareness and treatment facilities for stroke patients.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Hypertension
description: Focuses on early detection and management of high blood pressure.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Obesity
description: Promotes healthy lifestyle and awareness to reduce obesity-related risks.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Genetic Disorders
description: Provides screening and treatment for congenital and genetic disorders.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Rare Diseases
description: Supports treatment and awareness for rare diseases in India.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Anemia
description: Provides iron and folic acid supplementation to reduce maternal anemia.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Child Malnutrition
description: Provides nutritional supplements and awareness to reduce child malnutrition.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Adolescent Health Issues
description: Focuses on adolescent health, nutrition, and reproductive health education.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Health Issues
description: Provides antenatal and postnatal care to reduce maternal mortality.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Child Health Issues
description: Supports immunization, nutrition, and healthcare for children.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Adolescent Reproductive Health
description: Provides reproductive health education and services for adolescents.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal Mortality due to Hemorrhage
description: Focuses on reducing maternal deaths caused by hemorrhage.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Neonatal Mortality
description: Provides neonatal care facilities to reduce newborn deaths.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Infant Malnutrition
description: Provides nutritional support and awareness to reduce infant malnutrition.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Maternal and Child Health
description: Umbrella program covering maternal and child healthcare services.

name: National Programme for Prevention and Control of Reproductive Health Issues
description: Provides reproductive health awareness and services for women.
